# Quick Reference - Mod Release System

## For Mod Developers

### Making Changes to a Mod

```bash
# 1. Edit your mod files
cd lua/money-cheat
# Edit entry.lua, README.md, etc.

# 2. Commit and push
git add .
git commit -m "feat: add new feature to money-cheat"
git push origin main

# 3. Done! The system automatically:
#    - Bumps version (0.1.0 → 0.1.1)
#    - Creates release
#    - Updates docs
```

### Manual Release with Custom Version Bump

```
1. Go to: https://github.com/CJFWeatherhead/TNI-Mods/actions
2. Click: "Release <your-mod>" (e.g., "Release money-cheat")
3. Click: "Run workflow"
4. Select:
   - Branch: main or beta
   - Bump type: patch / minor / major
5. Click: "Run workflow"
6. Wait ~2-3 minutes
7. Check: https://github.com/CJFWeatherhead/TNI-Mods/releases
```

### Adding a New Mod

```bash
# 1. Create mod directory
mkdir lua/my-awesome-mod
cd lua/my-awesome-mod

# 2. Create required files
cat > metadata.yaml << EOF
Name: My Awesome Mod
Description: Does something cool
Author: YourName
Version: 0.1.0
Creation Date: $(date +%Y-%m-%d)
Last Updated: $(date +%Y-%m-%d)
Development Status: Active Development
Game Version Supported: beta
ID: my-awesome-mod
Dependencies: []
EOF

# Create entry.lua with your mod code
cat > entry.lua << EOF
-- ===== MOD CONFIGURATION START =====
local config = {
    enabled = true
}
-- ===== MOD CONFIGURATION END =====

print("My Awesome Mod loaded!")
EOF

# Create README.md
cat > README.md << EOF
# My Awesome Mod

Description of what your mod does.

## Features
- Feature 1
- Feature 2
EOF

# 3. Copy a workflow template
cp ../../.github/workflows/release-money-cheat.yml \
   ../../.github/workflows/release-my-awesome-mod.yml

# 4. Edit the workflow file - change mod_name to 'my-awesome-mod'

# 5. Commit and push
git add .
git commit -m "feat: add my-awesome-mod"
git push origin main
```

## For Repository Maintainers

### Workflow Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `mod-release-reusable.yml` | Core release logic (DON'T MODIFY unless changing system) |
| `release-<mod>.yml` | Triggers for each mod (9 files) |
| `build-zig-*.yml` | Builds LuaJIT (only triggers on LuaJIT changes) |
| `build-gnu-*.yml` | Builds LuaJIT (only triggers on LuaJIT changes) |
| `deploy-website.yml` | Manual docs deployment (if needed) |

### Python Scripts

| File | Purpose | Usage |
|------|---------|-------|
| `update_mod_version.py` | Increments version in metadata.yaml | `python update_mod_version.py lua/mod/metadata.yaml patch` |
| `generate_mod_pages.py` | Creates Hugo pages from metadata | `cd docs && python generate_mod_pages.py` |

### Debugging a Failed Workflow

```bash
# 1. Go to Actions tab
# 2. Click on the failed workflow run
# 3. Click on the failed job
# 4. Expand the failed step
# 5. Common issues:

# Version parsing error
# → Check metadata.yaml has valid YAML syntax
# → Ensure Version field exists and is valid

# Release creation error
# → Check if release tag already exists
# → Verify GITHUB_TOKEN has permissions

# Cloudflare deployment error
# → Check CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN secret
# → Check CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID secret
# → Verify docs/public/ was created

# Commit push error
# → May be race condition with multiple workflows
# → Re-run the workflow
```

### Emergency: Disable All Mod Releases

```bash
# Option 1: Disable workflows in GitHub UI
# Go to Actions → Workflows → Click each → Disable

# Option 2: Temporarily remove workflow files
git checkout -b disable-releases
rm .github/workflows/release-*.yml
git commit -m "temp: disable mod releases"
git push

# To re-enable:
git checkout main
git merge disable-releases --no-ff
```

### Secrets Management

Required secrets in repository settings:

```
Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions → Repository secrets

CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
├── Purpose: Deploy docs to Cloudflare Pages
├── Format: Bearer token
└── Get from: Cloudflare Dashboard → API Tokens

CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
├── Purpose: Identify Cloudflare account
├── Format: 32-character hex string
└── Get from: Cloudflare Dashboard → Account ID

GITHUB_TOKEN
├── Purpose: Create releases, commit changes
├── Format: Auto-generated by GitHub Actions
└── Permissions: Contents: write, Deployments: write
```

## Command Reference

### Run Version Script Locally

```bash
# Patch version (0.0.X)
python .github/scripts/update_mod_version.py lua/money-cheat/metadata.yaml patch

# Minor version (0.X.0)
python .github/scripts/update_mod_version.py lua/money-cheat/metadata.yaml minor

# Major version (X.0.0)
python .github/scripts/update_mod_version.py lua/money-cheat/metadata.yaml major

# Specific version
python .github/scripts/update_mod_version.py lua/money-cheat/metadata.yaml 2.0.0
```

### Regenerate Docs Locally

```bash
cd docs
python3 generate_mod_pages.py
hugo server  # Preview at http://localhost:1313
```

### Package Mod Manually

```bash
cd lua/money-cheat
zip -r ../../money-cheat-0.1.1.zip . -x ".*" -x "__pycache__/*"
```

### Test Workflow Locally (Advanced)

```bash
# Install act: https://github.com/nektos/act
# Run a workflow locally:
act -W .github/workflows/release-money-cheat.yml \
    -s GITHUB_TOKEN=<your-token> \
    --eventpath event.json
```

## Version Bumping Guide

| Change Type | Bump Type | Example | Use When |
|-------------|-----------|---------|----------|
| Fix typo in README | patch | 0.1.0 → 0.1.1 | Documentation fixes |
| Fix bug in logic | patch | 0.1.0 → 0.1.1 | Bug fixes |
| Add new parameter | minor | 0.1.0 → 0.2.0 | New features (backward compatible) |
| Add new feature | minor | 0.1.0 → 0.2.0 | Enhancements |
| Change default behavior | minor | 0.1.0 → 0.2.0 | User-facing changes |
| Remove feature | major | 0.1.0 → 1.0.0 | Breaking changes |
| Rewrite mod | major | 0.1.0 → 1.0.0 | Complete overhaul |
| Change configuration format | major | 0.1.0 → 1.0.0 | Non-backward compatible |

## URL Patterns

```
GitHub Release:
https://github.com/CJFWeatherhead/TNI-Mods/releases/tag/<mod-id>-v<version>

Download Zip:
https://github.com/CJFWeatherhead/TNI-Mods/releases/download/<mod-id>-v<version>/<mod-id>-<version>.zip

Documentation:
https://tower.networking.ink/mods/<mod-id>/

Example (money-cheat v0.1.1):
Release:     https://github.com/.../releases/tag/money-cheat-v0.1.1
Download:    https://github.com/.../releases/download/money-cheat-v0.1.1/money-cheat-0.1.1.zip
Docs:        https://tower.networking.ink/mods/money-cheat/
```

## File Structure Reference

```
TNI-Mods/
├── .github/
│   ├── workflows/
│   │   ├── mod-release-reusable.yml      ← Core logic
│   │   ├── release-2x-bandwidth-switches.yml
│   │   ├── release-all-proposals.yml
│   │   ├── release-device-tweaker.yml
│   │   ├── release-floor-reward-scaling.yml
│   │   ├── release-inverse-prices.yml
│   │   ├── release-modapi-diagnostic.yml
│   │   ├── release-money-cheat.yml
│   │   ├── release-random-warranties.yml
│   │   ├── release-user-floor-addressing.yml
│   │   ├── build-zig-continuous.yml      ← Updated paths
│   │   ├── build-gnu-continuous.yml      ← Updated paths
│   │   ├── build-zig-pr.yml              ← Updated paths
│   │   ├── build-gnu-pr.yml              ← Updated paths
│   │   └── deploy-website.yml
│   ├── scripts/
│   │   └── update_mod_version.py         ← Version script
│   ├── ARCHITECTURE.md                   ← System diagrams
│   ├── CHANGES-SUMMARY.md                ← What changed
│   └── MOD-RELEASE-SYSTEM.md             ← Detailed guide
├── docs/
│   ├── generate_mod_pages.py             ← Updated with version support
│   └── content/mods/
│       ├── 2x-bandwidth-switches.md
│       ├── money-cheat.md
│       └── ... (generated)
├── lua/
│   ├── 2x-bandwidth-switches/
│   │   ├── entry.lua
│   │   ├── metadata.yaml                 ← Now has Version field
│   │   └── README.md
│   ├── money-cheat/
│   │   ├── entry.lua
│   │   ├── metadata.yaml                 ← Now has Version field
│   │   └── README.md
│   └── ... (9 mods)
├── mod-metadata-schema.yaml              ← Updated with Version field
└── README.md                             ← Updated with release info
```

## Quick Troubleshooting

| Problem | Solution |
|---------|----------|
| Workflow not triggering | Check branch (main/beta), check paths match |
| Version not updating | Check YAML syntax, ensure Version field exists |
| Release already exists | Workflow will delete and recreate automatically |
| Docs not updating | Check Hugo build step logs, verify Python script |
| Cloudflare deployment fails | Check secrets, verify account/project settings |
| Commit fails | May be concurrent workflow, re-run |
| Zip file empty | Check zip command, verify files exist |

## Support

For issues or questions:
1. Check [MOD-RELEASE-SYSTEM.md](MOD-RELEASE-SYSTEM.md) for detailed docs
2. Review [ARCHITECTURE.md](ARCHITECTURE.md) for system diagrams
3. Check workflow logs in GitHub Actions
4. Open an issue in the repository
